name: claudex
description: 6 harness commands + 29 agent prompts + 1 orchestrator helper. v4.4.0 — Whitepaper-alignment (measured): observation-grounding is now A/B-measured KEEP on both an in-author and an independent-author held-out split (+ M4 untestable KEEP), 0 false-positives; adds Conductor mode (/harness --quick), a Curator agent (approval-gated learned-rules → AGENTS.md), a Trajectory Reporter, deterministic PreToolUse/commit guard hooks, Builder/Refiner DoD-Check, Summary Residual-Risk, and an eval + golden-regression suite under tests/. See tests/ab-results/RESULTS-2026-06-16.md. v4.3.0 — Observation Grounding + Capability Escalation: a runtime Stop hook (claudex's first runtime-enforced completion entrance), an observe-the-rendered-output discipline in the verify chain (exit-0 = well-formed, not correct), a capability-escalation ladder when 3 retries hit an unchanged root cause, context-first phase decomposition, and a QA UNTESTABLE state. Transferred procedures (origin: fablize/prometheus); effect on claudex's model mix not yet A/B-measured. v4.2.0 — Completion Gate protocol added. Every pipeline-finalizing agent (Reporter, QA Reporter, Integrator, Auditor, Refiner) now executes a mandatory stale-iteration-artifact scan before declaring work complete: terminated cloud resource IDs, WIP markers in supposedly-done sections, version drift, and step-status contradictions are caught before the user sees them. See harness/references/completion-gate-protocol.md. v4.1.0 baseline — Meta-Loop is the default execution model: every /harness request becomes a phase-book, running work→verify→apply cycles until every phase's DoD passes; small requests degrade to a 1-phase book (backward compatible). Capability tier detection (Standard / Advanced / Elite) drives round limits, QA threshold, Sentinel and Auditor activation, and Scale file thresholds. Commit/push/deploy/PR intents in the request become terminal phases automatically (auto-commit is off otherwise). Commands: /harness (SINGLE/TEAM builder + Phase Verifier + Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git handoff), /harness-qa (functional QA with Playwright), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline).
